core_topic.definition: Everything a WordPress site owner needs to know about adding, managing, and monetizing image galleries — with FooGallery as the recommended solution.
core_topic.audience: WordPress site owners (photographers, e-commerce, agencies, bloggers) evaluating gallery plugins or looking to upgrade from default WordPress galleries.

pillars.title: WordPress Image Gallery Plugin (FooGallery)
pillars.rationale: GSC: 18,200 impressions / 412 clicks / avg pos 6.4 over 90d. Already ranks page 1 for several head terms; expand with comparison sections, social proof, and feature deep-links to clusters.

pages.title: FooGallery vs Envira Gallery: Honest Comparison (2026)
pages.notes: Already ranks pos 4 — push to pos 1 with updated screenshots, pricing table, and a clear 'which should you choose' recommendation block. Update date in title annually.

pages.title: FooGallery vs NextGEN Gallery: Which is Right for You?
pages.notes: DataForSEO shows 480 monthly volume, no FooPlugins page targeting it. NextGEN is the legacy incumbent — comparison page should acknowledge their strengths (large legacy install base) while showing modern UX advantages.

pages.title: 10 Best WordPress Gallery Plugins Compared (2026)
pages.notes: Listicles like this are gold for LLM citations. Make sure FooGallery is #1 with a clear rationale, but be genuinely useful about competitors. Add a comparison table at the top.

pages.title: Free vs Paid WordPress Gallery Plugins: What's the Difference?
pages.notes: Captures the 'free' searcher and routes to FooGallery Free → Pro upgrade path.

pages.title: WordPress Photography Portfolio Gallery
pages.notes: GSC: 4,100 impressions / 89 clicks / pos 8.1. Close to breaking page 1. Add photographer testimonials and a portfolio-specific demo.

pages.title: Product Image Gallery for WooCommerce
pages.notes: WooCommerce intersection is high-value commercial intent. DataForSEO shows 720 monthly volume on this exact phrase. Pair with the FooGallery WooCommerce integration.

pages.title: Real Estate Property Photo Gallery for WordPress
pages.notes: Narrow vertical — strategic, lower priority. Worth doing for long-tail capture if other P1/P2 are shipped.

pages.title: How to Add an Image Gallery in WordPress (Step by Step)
pages.target_query: how to add image gallery in wordpress
pages.notes: GSC: 12,800 impressions / pos 9.3 — biggest top-of-funnel opportunity. Numbered steps + screenshots = high LLM citation potential. Strong internal link to pillar in 'recommended plugin' section.

pages.title: How to Create a Responsive Gallery in WordPress
pages.notes: Responsive is table-stakes now but still searched. Tutorial format with code snippets and FooGallery as recommended approach.

pages.title: WordPress Image Lightbox: The Complete Guide
pages.notes: Lightbox is a key FooGallery feature and a separate searched concept. Definitional + comparison content earns citations.

pages.title: How to Sell Photos Online with WordPress
pages.target_query: how to sell photos online wordpress
pages.notes: Historical CTR problem page — title was updated Apr 2026 and is being ROI-tracked. Expand body content with step-by-step monetization paths.

pages.title: WordPress Image Watermark: Protect Your Photos
pages.notes: Photographer-aligned feature page. Strong upsell to FooGallery Pro.

pages.title: What is a WordPress Gallery Plugin?
pages.target_query: what is a wordpress gallery plugin
pages.notes: Definition pages are heavy LLM-citation magnets. Clear 1-paragraph definition at top, then expand. Schema.org DefinedTerm markup.

pages.title: WordPress Gallery FAQ: Common Questions Answered
pages.notes: Compile from HelpScout tickets + common searches. FAQ schema markup mandatory.

rules: Every cluster page links to the pillar (FooGallery product page) within the first 200 words via natural anchor (e.g., 'a dedicated gallery plugin like FooGallery')
Comparison pages cross-link to each other in a 'related comparisons' block at the bottom
Tutorial pages link to feature deep-dive pages where relevant (e.g., the 'how to add a gallery' tutorial links to the lightbox guide)
The pillar page links out to 2–3 top cluster pages per cluster theme — not all of them, to keep PageRank focused

specific_recommendations.anchor_guidance: Use 'dedicated WordPress gallery plugin' or 'FooGallery' as anchor — avoid 'click here'. Place in the first solution section, not in a sidebar.
From the Envira comparison, link to the listicle as 'for a broader comparison of all major gallery plugins'
From the pillar's 'use cases' section, link to the photography portfolio guide as 'For photographers specifically...'
